about.title: About
about.intro_text: We are a group of passionate swing dancers bringing Collegiate Shag to Salzburg. Our workshops cater to all levels — from complete beginners to experienced dancers.
about.level_beginner_desc: No prior experience needed! We start from scratch: basic steps, rhythm, bounce, and first simple figures. Perfect for anyone wanting to try Collegiate Shag for the first time.
about.level_beginner_improver_desc: You know the basics and want more! We deepen technique, work on musicality, and learn new variations. Prerequisite: basic knowledge of Collegiate Shag.
about.level_intermediate_desc: For dancers with a solid foundation. We work on more complex figures, partnering, dynamics, and styling. You should be comfortable with basic Shag variations.
about.level_intermediate_advanced_desc: Advanced technique and creative dancing. Focus on musicality, flow, fast tempos, and challenging combinations.
about.level_advanced_desc: For experienced dancers with several years of Shag experience. Advanced footwork variations, complex partnering concepts, and improvisation.
about.what_is_shag_text: Collegiate Shag is a high-energy partner dance from the Swing era of the 1920s–1940s. It’s characterized by fast footwork, bounce, and a close dance hold. It’s danced primarily to faster Swing and Jazz music.
